notes: Core mechanics mostly present but platform carrying uses wrong delta-time formula (vx/60*(1/60) instead of vx*dt), making river movement nearly broken, and the frog death check runs while hopping is still animating causing false deaths; visual layout is recognizable but home bay positions and grid math feel off.

Core Frogger loop exists, but there are notable logic/render issues such as inconsistent entity positioning/collision alignment, broken death animation path, and especially incorrect platform carrying movement that hurts gameplay accuracy.
